dashboard.title: Good morning 👋
dashboard.description: Here's a snapshot of your business today. Use ⌘K to jump to anything.
dashboard.recentActivityDesc: Across all modules in this workspace
dashboard.lowStockSummary: {count, plural, one {# product is} other {# products are}} at or below reorder point.
dashboard.activityLeadQualifiedMeta: Sarah promoted to Opportunity · 14 min ago
dashboard.activityLowStockMeta: 12 units left · reorder at 25 · 1 hr ago

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Everything scheduled across CRM and Sales — activities, deal close dates, and deliveries — in one view.
calendar.noEventsAgenda: No events to show. Add a due date to an activity, set an expected close date on a deal, or schedule a delivery date on a sales order.
calendar.eventCount: {count, plural, =0 {No events} one {# event} other {# events}}
calendar.eventsShort: {count, plural, =0 {No events} one {# event} other {# events}}

crm.title: Pipeline
crm.description: Drag a card between stages, tag deals, log activities — or switch to List, Leads, or Lost views.
crm.noLeadsHint: New unqualified opportunities will land here. Click Convert in the drawer to promote them.
crm.noLostHint: Drop a deal to LOST from the detail drawer to see it here.

customers.title: Customers
customers.description: Companies and people across your sales pipeline.

table.empty: No customers yet — add your first one.

dialog.description: Add a company or person. You can refine details later.
dialog.name: Name

drawer.confirmDelete: Delete {name}? Their deals and orders will be detached but kept.

crm.leadsSummary: {count, plural, one {# unqualified lead} other {# unqualified leads}} · pipe {value}
crm.lostSummary: {count, plural, one {# lost deal} other {# lost deals}} · total {value}

drawer.leadBannerHint: Click Convert to promote it to an opportunity once qualified.
drawer.name: Name
drawer.notesPlaceholder: Add context, next steps, conversation log…

newDealDialog.description: Create an opportunity. You can refine the details after.

activity.title: Activity
activity.empty: Nothing logged yet — add a note or schedule a follow-up above.

bulk.confirmDelete: {count, plural, one {Delete # deal? This can't be undone.} other {Delete # deals? This can't be undone.}}

tags.pressColorToCreate: Press a color below to create
tags.heading: Tags

import.title: Import customers from CSV
import.description: Drop a .csv file with columns likename, email, phone, company, type. Headers are auto-detected (any case, common synonyms). Existing customers (matched by email) are skipped.
import.dropZone: Drop CSV here or <pick>pick a file</pick>

customer360.openDeals: {count, plural, one {# open deal} other {# open deals}}
customer360.aiBriefDescription: One-page situational read covering health, opportunities, blockers, and next moves.
customer360.noDeals: No deals yet with this customer.
customer360.noOrders: No orders yet with this customer.
customer360.activityTimelineDescription: Notes, calls, emails, and tasks across every deal with this customer.
customer360.filesDescription: Anything attached to this contact, their deals, or their orders.

sales.title: Sales
sales.description: Quotes → confirmed orders → deliveries → invoicing. Click any card for line items.

dialog.newQuoteDescription: Drafts a new sales order. Send it to the customer when you're ready.

email.subject: Quote {number} from {workspace}
email.sendDescription: The PDF version of this quote is attached automatically. AI drafts the body — review and edit before sending.
email.disabledNotice: Email is off. Add to and restart the dev server to enable sending. You can still preview the draft below.
email.bodyManualHint:
Hi {name},

Please find the attached quote for…

stripe.copied: Copied — paste into the Send email body
stripe.checkoutDescription: Send this URL to your customer. They'll pay with card or wallet on Stripe's hosted page. On success the order auto-advances to <status></status>.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: Product catalog used across Sales quotes and order lines.
inventory.newProductDescription: Add a product to your catalog. Used by Sales line items.
inventory.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? Existing order lines will keep the snapshot.
inventory.reorderHint: Triggers low-stock alert on the dashboard when on-hand drops to this level.
inventory.descriptionPlaceholder: Internal notes, fact sheet, marketing copy…
inventory.activeHint: Inactive products are hidden from new quotes.
inventory.reasonPlaceholder: Damaged in transit, cycle count, vendor return…

wh.title: Warehouses
wh.description: Physical sites where you store and move stock.
wh.dialogDescription: A warehouse is a physical site. Its code prefixes its locations and operations.
wh.emptyDescription: Add your first warehouse to organize stock by site.

sc.title: Storage Categories
sc.description: Policies that constrain what and how much a location can hold.
sc.dialogDescription: Group locations by storage rules — capacity and max weight.
sc.allowNewHint: Putaway may auto-route new products into this category.
sc.emptyDescription: Create categories like Bulk, Fragile, or Cold chain.

ot.title: Operation Types
ot.description: Templates for receipts, deliveries, and internal transfers.
ot.dialogDescription: An operation type is the template for a kind of stock move at a warehouse.
ot.emptyDescription: Add Receipts, Delivery Orders, or Internal Transfers.

loc.title: Locations
loc.description: Where stock physically lives — bins, zones, and virtual locations.
loc.emptyDescription: Add internal, vendor, customer, or virtual locations.

stockReport.title: Stock
stockReport.description: Live on-hand quantity and value per product.

movesReport.title: Moves History
movesReport.description: Every stock movement across the workspace.

soon.variantsDesc: Sell one product in multiple sizes, colors, and configurations.
soon.packagesDesc: Pack products into boxes and pallets for storage and shipping.
soon.reportLocationsDesc: On-hand quantity and valuation broken down by location.
soon.movesAnalysisDesc: Pivot and chart stock movements by product, type, and period.
soon.performanceDesc: Operational KPIs for receipts, deliveries, and stock health.
soon.settingsDesc: Configure operation defaults, units, and tracking options.
soon.routesDesc: Multi-step supply routes that move goods between locations.
soon.rulesDesc: Automatic replenishment when stock drops below a threshold.
soon.putawayDesc: Automatically assign incoming stock to the right location.

uom.title: Units of Measure
uom.description: Measure and sell products in different units — convert between them with a factor.
uom.dialogDescription: A unit belongs to a category. Set how many of a reference unit it contains (e.g. 1 KG = 1000 g).
uom.factorHint: How many reference units one of this contains. Use 1 for the category's base unit.
uom.emptyDescription: Add units like KG, g, L, or Pack of 6.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Live snapshot computed from your CRM + Sales data.
reports.revenueTrendDesc: Last 12 months — won deals + invoiced orders

settings.title: Settings
settings.workspaceDescription: How your workspace shows up across the product and on outgoing documents.
settings.accentColorHintDocs: Used for buttons, links, focus rings, and PDF document headers.
settings.accentColorHintPreview: Used for buttons, links, focus rings, and highlights. Try clicking around — it's a preview that resets on reload.
settings.logoHint: PNG, JPG, WebP, or SVG. Square logos look best. Max 2 MB.
settings.sampleDataDescription: Your workspace was seeded with example deals, products, customers, and a vendor so you can click around immediately. Clear them when you're ready to use your own data.
settings.sampleDataCount: Currently {count} sample deals plus their related products, vendors, and customers.
settings.deleteWorkspaceDescription: Permanently delete this workspace and all of its data.
settings.inviteTeammatesDescription: They'll receive an invitation email with a link. Pick a workspace role — they can be changed later.
settings.inviteTeammatesNoPermission: Only owners and admins can invite teammates. Ask your workspace admin if you need someone added.
settings.peopleInWorkspace: {count, plural, one {# person in this workspace} other {# people in this workspace}}
settings.invitationCreated: Invitation created — copy the link below
settings.emailOffNote: Email is off (no RESEND_API_KEY). You can still create invitations and copy the link manually.
settings.currentPlanDescription: You're on the <badge></badge> plan. Billing is paused while ERP Mini is in early preview.
settings.themeDescription: How ERP Mini looks on your device.
settings.auditDescription: Every create, update, and status change recorded across this workspace. Useful for compliance and figuring out who did what.
settings.noAuditEntries: No audit entries yet. Move a deal or create an order and check back.
settings.apiTokensDescription: Bearer tokens for the public REST API at /api/v1/*. Scope: Read-only or Read & Write. Tokens are shown once at creation.
settings.outboundWebhooksDescription: POST to your URL whenever subscribed events fire (deal won/lost, order delivered, etc.). Each request is signed with an HMAC-SHA256 secret in the aywa-signature header.

shared.whenItShips: When it ships, you'll be able to:
shared.previewNote: Preview the shell. Real data lands in a future phase.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.description: Chart of accounts, journals, bank reconciliation, and statements.

features.chartOfAccounts: Double-entry chart of accounts with multi-currency
features.statements: Trial balance, P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow
features.periodClose: Period close workflow with reviewer sign-off

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Bills of materials, work orders, and production planning.

features.boms: Multi-level BOMs with operations and routings
features.mrp: MRP run that respects lead times and stock policies

hr.title: HR
hr.description: Team roster, departments, and time-off requests.
hr.emptyEmployees: No employees yet. Add your first one with the button above.
hr.addEmployeeDescription: Add someone to your team roster.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.description: Everything that needs your attention today and this week — tasks, closing deals, stale opportunities, overdue deliveries.

empty.title: Inbox zero
empty.description: No overdue tasks, no stale opportunities, no late deliveries. Either you're on top of everything or this workspace is brand new — both fine.

now.title: Now
now.description: Past their due date or due today.

thisWeek.title: This week
thisWeek.description: Close dates or task deadlines in the next 7 days.

needsAttention.title: Needs attention
needsAttention.description: Open opportunities with no activity in 14+ days.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Track client and internal work as Kanban boards of tasks.
projects.emptyDescription: Create your first project to start tracking tasks.
projects.dialogDescription: Start a project — add tasks once it's created.

purchase.title: Purchase
purchase.description: Vendors, RFQs, purchase orders, and goods received. Drag a card to advance the workflow — RECEIVED auto-updates inventory.
purchase.noVendorsHint: Add a vendor before creating purchase orders. Vendors live in their own table so you can attach pricelists and payment terms.
purchase.noVendorsTableHint: Add your first vendor to start creating purchase orders.
purchase.notesPlaceholder: Internal notes, special instructions to vendor…
purchase.newPoDescription: Start a draft. Add line items inside the drawer once created.
purchase.addVendorDescription: Add a supplier you buy from. You can edit details from the row later.
purchase.sendRfqDescription: Request a quote from the vendor. The PDF version of this purchase order is attached automatically.
purchase.subject: Subject
purchase.bodyPlaceholder:
Hi '{'vendor'}',

Please provide a quote for…
purchase.markRfqSentAfterDelivery: Mark order as RFQ sent after delivery

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.description: Recurring contracts that bill monthly, quarterly, or yearly. Roll up into MRR / ARR on Reports.
subscriptions.emptyAll: No subscriptions yet — add your first recurring contract above.
subscriptions.dialogDescription: Recurring revenue contract — billed monthly, quarterly, or yearly. Counts toward MRR/ARR on Reports.

landing.badge: Early preview — UI shell live, modules shipping soon
landing.heroSubtitle: ERP Mini is a modern, opinionated platform that brings CRM, sales, inventory, accounting, projects, and reporting under one calm, fast interface — without the legacy bloat.
landing.featuresTitle: Built around how teams actually work.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Most ERPs were designed in the 2000s and never got the memo. ERP Mini borrows what works — and rebuilds the rest from scratch.

features.title: Command palette first
features.body: ⌘K from anywhere to find a record, jump to a module, or kick off an action. No more hunting through nested menus.

features.title: Unified data model
features.body: Customers, products, orders, and projects share one schema — so reports, automations, and integrations just work.

features.title: Designed, not assembled
features.body: A cohesive design system with first-class dark mode, modern typography, and consistent patterns across every module.

landing.principlesTitle: Design principles we won't compromise on.
landing.principlesSubtitle: ERP shouldn't feel like punishment. We hold every screen to the same bar you'd expect from a great consumer product.
landing.principlesDetail: Every screen is designed, not bolted on — keyboard-first navigation, instant global search, and inline editing are standard, not add-ons. The result is software your team actually wants to open.
principles: Real dark mode, not inverted colors
Side panels instead of full-page navigation
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to run your business beautifully?
landing.ctaBody: Spin up the demo workspace in seconds — no setup, no credit card.
landing.ctaSocialProof: Loved by founders, operators, and finance teams

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.entryDialogDescription: Record a balanced transaction. Debits must equal credits before posting.
accounting.autoManagedNote: This entry was generated from a source document and is managed automatically.
accounting.noEntriesHint: Create your first entry, or invoice a sales order to generate one automatically.
accounting.accountDialogDescription: Accounts are the building blocks of your ledger.
accounting.journalDialogDescription: Journals group related entries (sales, purchases, bank…).
accounting.chartDescription: The accounts and journals that make up your ledger.
accounting.reportsDescription: Trial balance, profit & loss, and balance sheet from posted entries.

reports.inBalance: Debits and credits are in balance
reports.notInBalance: Out of balance — check your entries
reports.emptyHint: Post a journal entry to see your financial statements.

empty.title: Set up your books
empty.description: Create a standard chart of accounts and journals to start recording transactions. You can customize everything afterwards.

toasts.needTwoLines: An entry needs at least two lines
toasts.mustBalance: Debits and credits must balance before posting

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Bills of materials and production orders, wired to your stock ledger.
manufacturing.newOrderDescription: Produce a quantity of a product. If it has a BOM, components are consumed on completion.
manufacturing.noBomForProduct: No BOM — this order won't consume components.
manufacturing.noComponents: No components — this order produces without consuming stock.
manufacturing.shortageNote: Some components are short on stock for the planned quantity.
manufacturing.committedNote: Stock was committed when this order was completed.
manufacturing.bomsDescription: Recipes: what each finished product is made from.
manufacturing.noBomsHint: Create a BOM to define the components a product is built from.
manufacturing.bomDialogDescription: Define the components consumed to produce one batch of the product.

auth.byContinuing: By continuing, you agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy.

signin.title: Welcome back
signin.subtitle: Sign in to your workspace with your password, or try the demo workspace with any email.
signin.tryDemo: Or try the demo workspace (no password)

signup.title: Create your workspace
signup.subtitle: Your own tenant, your own data. The demo workspace stays separate.

accept.alreadyAccepted: This invitation has already been accepted
accept.title: Accept your invitation
accept.subtitle: Set a password to finish joining {workspace}.

help.title: Help & shortcuts
help.subtitle: Keyboard shortcuts and tips to get around faster.
help.tip: Press ⌘K (or Ctrl+K) anywhere to search records, jump to a module, or run an action — no need to hunt through menus.

tour.step1Body: Your workspace is preloaded with a few example records so you can click around right away. When you're ready, head to Settings → General and clear them.
tour.step2Body: Press <kbd>⌘ K</kbd> (or <kbd>Ctrl K</kbd>) anywhere to jump to any module, deal, customer, or order.
tour.step3Body: Open CRM and drag a card between stages. When you drop a deal in WON, convert it to a sales order. Mark the order DELIVERED and watch inventory update automatically.
tour.step4Body: Inside any deal or customer drawer, you'll see Summarize, Draft email, and Account brief buttons. Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to .env to turn them on.

logistics.title: Logistics
logistics.description: Track your fleet on a live GPS map.
logistics.newVehicleDescription: Add a vehicle to your fleet. Update its live position later via the API or manually.
logistics.empty: No vehicles yet. Add your first one to start tracking.
logistics.confirmDelete: Delete vehicle “{name}”? This removes its position history too.
